name: Daedalus Loader
author: edmiester777 and R3ap3r
body_html:
1. Extract V1.2.zip and copy the contents into (Icarus-Root)/Icarus/Binaries/Win64
  2. Then, in that same folder, create a folder and call it 'mods', this is where you'll put .dll mods (Not xinput.dll or daedalus.dll).

Notes

  • The mod loader is not currently supported in dx12, so when starting Icarus, select dx11.

Credit

This project was originally a fork of an old version of SatisfactoryModLoader but has since transitioned to using a fork of UnrealModLoader. Most credit should go to RusselJerome for his UnrealModLoader project, and the amazing reverse engineers behind UnrealDumper.

name: Icarus Mod Editor
author: Jimk72
body_html: Allows creation of mods and installation into Icarus game.

name: Icarus Mod Editor Tool
author: Zayon
body_html:
A desktop application for ICARUS modders. IMET provides a clean, module-based GUI for creating and editing mod files - no JSON hand-editing required.

Built with Tauri | Windows | Auto-updating

Modules

Modinfo Editor

Edit your mod's .modinfo JSON file through a fully visual interface. Mod list panel, edit panel with general info, description, links and resources, files. GitHub file browser to pick files directly from any repository.

Recipe Editor

Create and edit crafting recipes inside .json or .exmod mod files. Recipe list panel with search, recipe editor panel with output, inputs, and dropdowns for category/talent.

Auto-Updater

IMET checks for updates on launch. Updates are opt-in - the app will never update without your confirmation.

name: Icarus Mod Manager 2 Full
author: Jimk72
body_html: Full Release. Icarus Mod Manager 2.4.0 - this is not backwards compatible with previous 1.6.7 or earlier versions! The folder structure has changed. Please create a new folder for this to be unzipped into. Make sure you click check for update after installed.
